$comment: Per-page Open Graph card variants. Each route gets its own PNG rendered from branding/assets/social-card.html with the title + subtitle below substituted into the template. Generator: scripts/system/generate-og-cards.mjs. Output: ui/static/og/{slug}.png (committed; production doesn't need Playwright). Pages reference the right card via the OG meta tags emitted by their +page.svelte's <svelte:head>.
